message:
🐛 fix(ui): center Learn dropdown on mobile instead of right-aligning (#7756)

On mobile viewports the Learn dropdown was positioned absolute right-0
relative to the trigger button, which pushed the left side off-screen
(truncated content).

Fix: on mobile (below sm breakpoint) use fixed positioning centered
horizontally (left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2) at top-14 (below navbar),
full viewport width minus 0.5rem padding each side, with max-height
and overflow-y-auto for scrollable content. On desktop (sm+) keeps
the original absolute right-0 positioning unchanged.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
